design_philosophy: ECHO requires a focused, calm, distraction-free environment. Use a muted dark 'terminal/console' aesthetic with monospace typography hints. Eliminate rounded corners for panels, favor 1px borders, and use a technical, low-contrast UI chrome to let the primary text and readback highlights shine.

font_families.heading: IBM Plex Mono, JetBrains Mono, monospace
font_families.captions: JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Mono, monospace

scale.captions: text-[10px] sm:text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500 font-mono

spacing_and_layout.mobile_first: Design as a mobile web app. Use max-w-md mx-auto on desktop to preserve the mobile layout proportions.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding for reading clarity. p-4 to p-6 for main content blocks.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Fixed bottom tab bar for mobile switching between 'Readback' and 'Dictation'. backdrop-blur-md bg-[#0A0A0E]/80 border-t border-slate-800.

micro_themes: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look): Expose structural edges with border-b and border-slate-800.
Retro-Futurism: Deep dark background, monospace fonts, small uppercase tech labels, pure minimal chrome.

components.text_intake: Custom text area: bg-transparent border-none focus:ring-0 resize-none text-slate-300. Give it height to fill available space.
components.file_dropzone: Dashed border (border-dashed border-slate-700), bg-[#111116]. Hover state changes to border-slate-500 bg-[#16161D].
components.dictation_console: Visual block resembling a terminal window. p-4 border border-slate-800 bg-[#0A0A0E]. Use `>_` prompts for instruction text.

buttons.standard: rounded-none border border-slate-800 bg-[#111116] hover:bg-slate-800 text-xs font-mono tracking-widest uppercase
buttons.record: rounded-full w-16 h-16 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300. Red tint for stop/record.

components.readback_highlight: Live readback word highlight should use a distinct background and text color shift (e.g. bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-300).

motion.highlight: Fast color transition for word-by-word highlight (duration-75) to avoid lagging behind speech.
motion.record_pulse: Subtle scale and opacity pulse when recording is active.

image_urls.description: Minimalistic textured black fabric. Use as an ultra-low opacity (e.g. 2-5%) fixed background overlay to give a tactile 'matte' terminal feel, avoiding pure flat digital black.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST include a kebab-case, role-based data-testid attribute. Examples: `data-testid="import-file-button"`, `data-testid="record-dictation-button"`, `data-testid="tts-play-button"`.

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK ENFORCEMENT: The prompt mentions 'Expo React Native mobile app' but your environment explicitly requires 'React js, Tailwind, shadcn/ui primitives'. Build a responsive React JS web app that visually and functionally mimics a native mobile app (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto container, bottom tab navigation, full height panes).

AESTHETIC: Strictly adhere to the muted dark terminal/console aesthetic. Use Shadcn components but override their default rounded corners (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`) and remove heavy shadows. Use `font-mono` for UI labels, tabs, and buttons.
LAYOUT: Implement a bottom tab navigation (Readback / Dictation).

READBACK PANEL: Must include a file drop zone/import button, a large textarea for text intake with a word counter, voice profile selector, transport controls, and dynamic word-by-word highlighting styling.
DICTATION PANEL: Must include a central circular record button, a stylized terminal window for the transcript, and timestamp/status labels (`> microphone standby`, etc.).
ICONS: Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for clean, crisp, monoline technical icons.
